authority_boundary: This receipt records an AI-authored documentation revision. It is not Agriculture evidence, policy approval, steward approval, release approval, publication authority, a ReleaseManifest, a PromotionDecision, a rollback record, or proof of runtime behavior.

rollback.strategy: Close the draft pull request before merge, or revert the generated-receipt commit and README commit in reverse order after merge.
